falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the 'bottom' pattern and 'HOLD' signal, invalidating the current verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 300% above the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge would suggest a blowoff top or extreme market conviction, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and low blowoff score (38).

falsification_conditions.condition: The RSI (14) breaks above 70 and forms a bullish divergence with price
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal overbought conditions and momentum reversal, falsifying the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a clear bullish trend.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
